title: EQ - Custom EQ - White circle when changing value on sliders
scenario: Custom EQ slider touch indicator (white circle) does not appear, follow, or disappear correctly on all 7 sliders in the Custom EQ screen
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Touch and hold any one of the 7 slider dots
While holding, slide the dot left or right
expected: A white circle appears around the slider dot when the user touches and holds it. The white circle follows the dot as the user slides left/right. The white circle disappears when the user releases the dot. This behavior applies to all 7 sliders in the Custom EQ screen.
